summary: I wrote the `open_questions` artifact to `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/clarifying-questions-writer/output/open_questions.md`. Since input.json carried no resolved inputs (no draft-requirements artifact was present in this worktree despite this being iteration 4), I grounded the questions in the ask and the actual codebase: the Pipeline/Phase/StepRun state enums, the two candidate "board" surfaces (the pipelines index table and the show page's four-phase column layout), and the existing Turbo Stream broadcast and progress-recording services. The artifact contains nine numbered questions — each answerable in a sentence or two with a stated assumed default — covering which page(s) get the summary, detail level, concurrent-step wording, update triggers (transitions/progress vs. heartbeats), degraded-state phrasing, gate-approval linking, terminal-state display, step naming, and whether recent history is in scope.
